items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of transferring bookings between locations, as stated in the linked use case. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The lack of concrete evidence to support the requirement leads to an inconclusive status regarding its validation.
